name: Specialty & Aviation
description: Combined specialty lines and aviation risks for European and global programs

content.description: Combined specialty and aviation insurance covering niche risks including political violence, trade credit, surety bonds, and aviation hull and liability. This local line consolidates low-frequency, high-severity exposures that require specialist underwriting expertise. Aviation covers European airlines, airport operators, and space launch programs. Specialty encompasses political risk for cross-border trade, EU export credit guarantees, and contingency coverages for major European events.
content.productExamples: Aviation hull & liability, Political risk, Trade credit, Surety bonds, Space launch, Contingency, Kidnap & ransom
